text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My third summer camp with Narita Taishin has
begun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other runners—with whom Narita Taishin
spent the last summer camp—drop by to invite
her to train and hang out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Narita Taishin is a little unsure, she's
open to the idea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It appears this summer camp will be a fun one.
